ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seismic_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the seismic station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the seismic station (e.g., IV.LIBRI.HNE.) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the seismic station */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the seismic station (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "station_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the seismic station */,
  "station_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the seismic station */,
  "station_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seismic station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seismic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic station that collected the event */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the seismic event (e.g., ML:1.5) */,
  "generic_amplitude" REAL /* Generic amplitude of the seismic event */,
  "period" REAL /* Period of the seismic event */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the seismic event (e.g., AML) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the seismic event (e.g., other) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the seismic event (e.g., m) */,
  "time_window_reference" TEXT /* Time window reference for the seismic event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the seismic event */,
  "event_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the seismic event */,
  "event_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the seismic event */,
  "event_depth" REAL /* Depth of the seismic event */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the seismic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seismic_events_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seismic_events_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seismic_events_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES seismic_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seismic_events_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seismic_events_magnitude FOREIGN KEY ("magnitude") REFERENCES magnitude_scales ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "magnitude_scales" (
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each magnitude scale */,
  "scale_name" TEXT /* Name of the magnitude scale (e.g., ML) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the magnitude scale */,
  "scale_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the magnitude scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., AML) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., other) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., m) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file for data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the seismic event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the seismic event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the seismic event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_versions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic station using the instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument */,
  "instrument_status" TEXT /* Status of the instrument (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "instrument_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_instruments_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES seismic_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the calibration */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_calibrations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES station_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
